ai_summary: The 13th Annual General Meeting of Krishna Defence and Allied Industries Limited highlighted strong operational and financial performance for FY 2025-26, notably including a successful migration from the NSE SME Platform to the Main Board and clean audit reports. Key resolutions approved included the declaration of a final dividend, significant alterations to the company's Memorandum of Association (Main and Ancillary Objects), and authorization for the Board to undertake borrowings, signaling strategic business expansion and enhanced financial flexibility. No red flags were identified in the proceedings or accompanying audit reports.
